events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. This is a staged material selection issue, so I’m treating undersized overloads as a non-compliant planned installation rather than completed defective work.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"staged\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 0,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Motor overload devices staged for installation are undersized for the motor circuit and nameplate/application requirements.\",
    \"Undersized overload protection can nuisance trip, prevent reliable operation, and indicates the staged materials do not match the engineered motor protection design.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not install the staged undersized overloads.\",
    \"Verify motor nameplate full-load current, service factor, temperature rise, controller/heater table, and engineered drawings against NEC Article 430 requirements.\",
    \"Replace with correctly sized overload heaters or electronic overload relay settings approved for the motor starter and application before work begins.\",
    \"Hold installation until electrical engineering or the authority responsible for the design accepts the corrected overload selection.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"Fail the staged work because motor overload protection must be selected and set for the specific motor and starter in accordance with NEC Article 430 and the engineered design. Undersized overloads are the wrong material choice; the corrective approach is to supply the properly rated overload heaters or adjustable overload relay settings based on the motor nameplate/application criteria, not install parts that will not provide the intended motor branch-circuit protection and reliable operation.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 430, Part III - Motor and Branch-Circuit Overload Protection\",
    \"NEC 430.32 - Continuous-duty motor overload device sizing\",
    \"NEC 430.6(A) - Motor circuit conductor and protection ampacity basis\",
    \"Engineered drawings and manufacturer overload relay/heater selection tables\"
  ]
}' > /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
